case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-30-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-01-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-02-2002

ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEFT CCSF'S OBJECTION TO ASSIGNMENT OF COMMISSIONER AS TRIAL JUDGE.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAY-29-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-23-2002. AUG-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
